products.title: Voltas 243V Vectra Elite 2 ton 3 star inverter Split AC|4-IN-1 Adjustable mode|Energy Efficient|High ambient Cooling-cools even at 52°C|Anti dust filter with Anti-microbial coating|Copper Coil| White
products.description:
About this item
Split AC with inverter compressor: Variable speed compressor which adjusts power depending on heat load. Convertible / adjustable with 4 cooling modes through remote control to operate in different tonnages for different cooling needs (20% to 120% capacity).
Capacity: 2 ton Suitable for large sized rooms (151 sq.ft to 200 sq.ft) & Ambient Temperature: 52 degree Celsius.
Energy Rating: 3 Star | Annual Energy Consumption 1220.59 kWh/year; Maximum cooling capacity: 6050W | ISSER Value: 3.81. BEE Label Validity Period: 1st July 2022 - 31st Dec 2025. Note: The current star rating is based on the 2025 BEE guidelines. Under the new 2026 BEE guidelines (effective from 1st Jan 2026), this product will be rated one star lower.
Manufacturer Warranty: 5 Years Comprehensive Warranty on the Product for the purchases done from 19th Sep'25 to 31st Dec'25, 10 Years Warranty on Inverter Compressor, 5 Years Warranty on PCB for the purchases done from Jan 2025 onwards
Copper Condenser Coil: Better cooling and requires low maintenance, Prevents from rust & corrosion; Increase durability; Uninterrupted cooling.
Key Features: Stabilizer free operation within 230 Voltage range; Digital Temperature Display ; Noise Level: 47 / 45 / 43 / 38 dB
Special Features: Anti Dust, Antimicrobial Protection, Anti-Corrosive Coating, LED Display, Self Diagnosis, Sleep Mode, Turbo, Remote Lock, Low Gas Diagnosis, Auto Restart, Anti Fungal

products.title: Xiaomi Power Bank 4i 20000mAh 33W Super Fast Charging PD |Smart 12 Layer Protection|Type C Input & Output|Triple Output Ports|Supports Android,Apple, Tablets, Earbuds,Watch(MI Powerbank),Black
products.description:
33W Fast Charging Support - High-speed charging with two-way fast charge via Type-C port; charges compatible devices quickly and efficiently. Superior Output
Smart Protection Safety & Compatibility - Equipped with 12-layer advanced circuit protection and compatible with a wide range of Android, iOS, and USB-C devices including smartphones, earbuds, and wearables.
Massive 20000mAh Battery Capacity - Reliable power backup for smartphones, tablets, wearables, and more; perfect for travel and long usage days. Retains 80% capacity after 300 cycles of usage.
Smart Power Delivery (PD) Support - Advanced PD 3.0 ensures intelligent and optimized charging for all your devices, including iPhones, Android phones, and tablets.
Durable Design - Premium matte black finish with anti-smudge texture, compact and portable build with a high-quality, durable shell.
Triple Port Output - Equipped with 2 USB-A and 1 USB-C output ports to charge three devices simultaneously, boosting convenience and productivity.
12 months Warranty with Pan Indian presence of service centres

products.title: Ghar Soaps Magic De-Tan Face wash With Saffron & Glutathione 100ml | Tan Removal, Brightening and Glowing Skin I For All Skin Type I For Men & Women (Pack of 1)
products.description:
Effective Tan Removal: Harness the power of nature to combat sun damage. Our face wash gently exfoliates and Reduce tan, restoring your skin's natural tone and texture. Enjoy a refreshed look and feel as your skin breathes free from environmental stressors.
Brightening & Glowing Skin: Infused with saffron and glutathione, renowned for their skin-brightening properties, this face wash works to enhance your complexion's luminosity. Saffron's natural antioxidants help lighten dark spots and blemishes, while glutathione boosts skin radiance, leaving you with a visibly brighter glow.
Unisex and Versatile: Designed for everyone, this face wash suits the needs of both men and women. Whether you're looking to refresh after a long day or start your morning routine with confidence, our face wash delivers consistent results.
High-Quality, Safe Ingredients: Our commitment to quality means using only the best ingredients, free from toxic chemicals, parabens, and sulfates. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that each use supports your skin's health without compromising safety.

products.title: OnePlus Nord Buds 3r TWS Earbuds up to 54 Hours Playback, 2-mic Clear Calls, 3D Spatial Audio, AI Translation, 12.4mm Drivers, Dual-Device Connectivity, 47ms Low Latency - Ash Black
products.description:
[Our longest battery ever, up to 54 hrs Music Playback]: A full charge Nord Buds 3r gives upto 54 hours of music playback. 10 minutes of fast charging gives 8 hours of music.
[Titanium-coated Drivers]: The Nord buds 3r comes with 12.4 mm Titanium-coated Drivers to enjoy deeper bass and powerful beats resulting in crystal - clear details in every note. It has fixed spatial audio specifically for OnePlus smartphone users.
[2-mic AI Call Noise Cancellation]: - Powered by AI call noise cancellation algorithm and anti-wind design, our call noise cancellation system excels at preserving human voice clarity while effectively suppressing high-frequency dynamic noise and wind interference in phone calls.
[AI Translation]: Simply tap your earbuds to activate AI Translation via your OnePlus phone and communicate with foreigners smoothly without barriers. [Dual Connection & Google Fast Pair]: The buds can simultaneously connect to two devices such as Android/iOS/Windows smartphone, tablets or computers allowing for quick and seamless device switching. Google Fast Pair simplifies the pairing process, saves time and enhance user convenience.
[Bluetooth & Latency]: New generation of Bluetooth 5.4 enables faster transmission of high-quality audio, providing a better audio experience. It also has 47ms low latency for better gaming.
Charging Cable not inluded in box

products.title: HAMMER Cyclone 1.39" Round Dial Rotating Crown Smart Watch with Calling Function, High Refresh Rate, Multi Sports Modes, Spo2, HR, Voice Assistant (Midnight Black)
products.description:
High Resolution Display - Hammer Cyclone comes with a 1.39" Color Full Touch Screen and a 360*360 Pixel High Resolution this smartwatch is covered to flaunt the sleek and stylish look always.
Calling Smart Watch - Hammer smart watch Cyclone enables you to make and receive calls directly from your watch via the built-in speaker and microphone. This smartwatch features a dial pad, option to access recent calls & sync your phone’s contacts
Smart Notifications Alerts - Get all your mobile phone notifications on this 1.39" Round dial smartwatch and never be late for a meeting, party or date
Multiple Watch Faces - 100+ Cloud based watch faces to choose from and match your outfit and look each day everyday
Instant Voice Assistants - Access real-time voice commands effortlessly in Cyclone round smart watch through instant voice assistants such as Siri and Google, directly from your smartwatch, for enhanced convenience
Stylish Body and Summer Friendly Strap Material: Hammer Cyclone round smartwatch comes with stylish polycarbonate body and four straps color options i.e midnight black, navy blue, coral peach, ash grey. This bluetooth calling smart watch is a premium choice. The straps are soft and skin friendly which makes it comfortable for wearing all day
Battery Backup: Cyclone calling watch comes with a strong battery that lasts upto 5 days (without bluetooth calling) and upto 2 days (with bluetooth calling)
In App GPS: Hammer watch Cyclone you to locate yourself with In-app GPS. You can access it directly through the Fitcloud Pro app
